description: CompositionThis blue and purple broad horizontal stripe half sleeve polo neck t-shirt is made of 100% cottonFittingSlimActionA casual t-shirt, wear it with any color denim, while going out with friends or just a casual get-together. WashCare Machine Wash separately in cold water, use mild detergent. Do not Bleach. Avoid Soaking. Remove promptly. Line Dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do Not Iron Directly on Print/embroidery.   Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
